description: This file defines a React component 'App' that displays a welcome message fetched from a backend API. It manages loading, success, and error states and renders the corresponding UI elements, including a refresh button and API documentation link.

methods.name: App
methods.description: React functional component that displays a welcome message and manages fetching state.

methods.name: load
methods.description: Asynchronous callback to fetch a welcome message from backend API and update component state.
